events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need decide pass/fail. Scenario: Structural bolting, DTI (direct tension indicator) squirter washers not fully crushed. Work rough-complete. RCSC Specification. DTI washers must be installed and tightened such that protrusions (squirters) are compressed to required gap per manufacturer/RCSC. Not fully crushed means insufficient bolt tension; non-compliant. Decision fail. Risk high? Structural bolting insufficient tension can lead to connection failure. High. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 80. Confidence 0.95. Findings: DTI squirter washers not fully crushed indicating inadequate bolt pretension. Actions: Retighten bolts to required pretension using turn-of-nut or calibrated wrench per RCSC; replace DTI washers if damaged; re-inspect all bolts. Rationale. References: RCSC Specification for Structural Joints Using High-Strength Bolts, Section on DTI washers and pretension. Need include all fields. value 0, sound_source "", event_time 0, rate 0, order [], workable []. Ensure valid JSON.

  "actions": ["Remove the load and retighten the bolts to the required pretension using an approved method (e.g., turn-of-nut, calibrated wrench) per RCSC.", "Replace any DTI washers that were damaged or over-compressed during re-tightening.", "Re-inspect all bolts in the connection to verify the DTI protrusions are compressed to the specified gap.", "Document the corrective action and inspection results before closing out the work."],
  "rationale": "RCSC requires high-strength structural bolts to be tightened to the specified minimum pretension. DTI washers indicate pretension by compression of their protrusions; squirters not fully crushed means the required bolt tension has not been reached, so the connection is non-compliant and structurally unsafe as installed.",
  "references": ["RCSC Specification for Structural Joints Using High-Strength Bolts, DTI washer installation and pretension verification requirements"]
}
